title: hieracium maledictum
intro: Hieracium maledictum, commonly known as devil's bit scabious, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Western Asia, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, devil's bit scabious has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin issues. The plant is also believed to have health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting healing, making it a popular remedy for skin conditions like eczema and acne. Devil's bit scabious can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
